description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker images build and push that can be triggered manually. The workflow consists of two jobs: obtain-targets and docker-buildx-bake. The obtain-targets job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, and lists targets using the docker/bake-action. The docker-buildx-bake job runs on a self-hosted Linux environment, needs the obtain-targets job, and uses a matrix strategy to build and push Docker images for each target.
